detail.description:
Expect a night of deep, forward-thinking club music between house, dub, ambient and techno, shaped by Marcus Worgull and Michael Mayer’s long-standing practice as selectors, moving fluidly between groove-driven club moments and more open, atmospheric passages.
On May 13th, a little over two years will have passed since ILLUSION first took the reins of a night at Open Ground. For a decade this year, Illusion have shared a particular sensitivity for music that wanders beyond well-trodden listening paths and sounds that drift somewhere off the map of habit. Over time, that shared instinct has grown into something more tangible: these days, they not only share a musical language, but also a roof, living in the same building in their hometown Cologne. And as if that was not domestic enough, Ole B/P’s father Marcus Worgull will stay close, appearing at Freifeld.

The guest artists who bring music to Illusion’s homely club nights could hardly be more different from one another. Yet beneath their differences runs a common thread: each of them carries a sound that feels personal, idiosyncratic, and lovingly cultivated rather than carefully packaged. This same spirit connects them to FEELX, a driving force behind KuH; an independent, off-center community festival in the Black Forest.

Admission 20 € / before 23:00 15 €

slots.bio:
As a producer, Marcus has been closely linked with Dixon and Âme’s Innervisions label and their unique brand of emotive club music for the entirety of his career. Friendship and a genuine interest in human interaction continue to inform all of his creative efforts. Those principles have led to collaborations with Peter Pardeike, Osunlade, Prins Thomas, Âme's Frank Wiedemann, Daniel Bortz, Mr. White (of Larry Heard fame) and UK singer/songwriter Fink.

Whether it’s original material or remixes for The xx, Tevo Howard & Tracy Thorne, UR’s Gerald Mitchell and labels like DFA or Running Back, Marcus’ tracks run the gamut from
dancefloor-ready jams to the expansive ambience of Vermont, his production duo with Danilo Plessow (Motor City Drum Ensemble) that has brought forth two acclaimed LPs on Cologne institution Kompakt Records.

His latest release with Innervisions, „Broad Horizons“ not only showcases his connection with
house music, it also hints at his love of dub and reggae. This open minded approach to music is
what makes Marcus Worgull succeed as a DJ who can perfectly read his audience, without losing
his instinct for deep haunting grooves that feed his soul.
In 2020 Marcus started his own label Chorus Records with releases by Frank Wiedemann, Imperieux a.o..
slots.name: Marcus Worgull

slots.bio:
Over the past four decades, Michael Mayer has done many things: maintained an internationally renowned DJ career; co-steered the Kompakt record label, physical store, and online shop; and produced a slow but steady stream of singles and albums, both solo, and in collaboration with the likes of Superpitcher, Reinhard Voigt, Kölsch, Barnt, and – on his 2016 album, & - a plethora of talents from dance music and beyond. He’s also released several ground-breaking, legendary mix discs, from 1998’s gorgeous Neuhouse, to the epochal Immer mixes, plus contributions to both the Fabric and DJ-Kicks series. Key to all of this, though, is the decorous drive of his clear, yet open-minded aesthetic, and a wide-eyed, thorough-going appreciation for music in all its variety and complexity.

When talking about this deep love of music, Mayer’s eyes light up: he’s clearly got the spirit in him. “I enjoy digging in all kinds of genres. What I’m trying to excerpt from all that is something that could function within the realms of Kompakt or my DJ sets. I’m constantly trying to find inspiration somewhere to take the label or my DJ sets to the next level. My life is hunting down tracks, identifying them, and trying to bring them to the world somehow.” You can sense this broad aesthetic purview in the albums he’s released via his Imara imprint: new albums from Heiko Voss and Servicio Al Cliente; reissues of Nigerian psych-rock with Ofege, the American soul-funk of Greenlove, and classic Cologne electronica by Schlammpeitziger.
As Mayer clarifies, though, this all weaves back into his calling as a selector. “I will always be, first and foremost, a DJ. Everything else I do, being production, curating the record store, curating the label, I’m doing all that with the heart of a DJ.” When asked what’s core to being a DJ, why it’s so important to him, he replies, simply, “It’s like a compass to navigate through this world. I’m striving to bring joy to this world, and make people happy, but at the same time, there’s always this educational thing. You want to play them the best possible music and the most state-of-the-art music right now.” Sometimes, that music is Mayer’s own, and he’s also always slowly working on new productions; there’s an EP, maybe an album to come, but it’ll take its own sweet time.

Ultimately, though, Mayer’s reflections on the work he does suggest an approach to life that’s built around care and consideration; around the spirit of sharing, both sharing the music that Mayer spends his time digging out for listeners, and sharing the space of the club, the venue, but also the collective, the crew, the heads that gather together wherever there’s a great night to be had. “I deeply care about this music, this company, the scene, the people,” he concludes, reflecting on his multi-faceted career to date. “It’s a whole filtering thing: filtering through the bullshit and presenting what I think is music that should be heard.”
slots.name: Michael Mayer

slots.bio: Ada Luvv is a North Rhine–Westphalia–based dancefloor enthusiast and crossword master. Rooted somewhere in that no-name land between niche and classy club music, she feels especially drawn to anything percussive, pulsating, spacious and delightfully quirky. While striving to channel her eclectic taste into mixes that are diverse yet inherently consistent, her deeper intention remains simple: to gather people, connect through music with like-minded souls, and create intense moments of collective spark.
slots.name: Ada Luvv

slots.bio:
FEELX is a Vienna-based DJ and part of the Klein und Haarig Festival.
For him, playing music and curating the DIY festival are about finding the balance between vision, space and intuition. Both a collection of choices with a focus on context and timing. No distractions, just tracks. One after the other.
slots.name: FEELX

slots.bio:
Magnus is a DJ from Cologne, Germany, whose work sails between ambient, trance and techno with a special interest in atmosphere and depth in sound.

Ole B/P is a Wuppertal-born and Cologne-based DJ. His DJ sets aim at balancing functionality with curiosity, maintaining a keen sense of context and curation.As co-founder of Illusion he has been an active part of the Cologne music scene for almost a decade, playing alongside artists like upsammy, Bambounou, OKO DJ and others.
slots.name: Magnus b2b Ole B/P

detail.description:
Gitter is a collective of artists and event organizers that has been actively shaping Essenʼs cultural scene since
2018. Originally specializing in techno raves that began secretly in the woods and have since evolved into events
in the local club scene and off-locations, the collective has continuously developed over the years. This growth
led to the creation of Gitter Raum, a cultural center on the outskirts of Essenʼs inner city, which in recent years has
provided space for intimate concerts, art exhibitions, readings, and diverse encounters.
Whether rave, concert, or exhibition — every Gitter event aims to create a temporary space where everyday
conventions give way to fresh ideas, allowing something new to emerge.

floors.name: LOBBY + ANNEX

slots.bio:
Annabelle is a DJ rooted in the Essen-based collective Gitter, bringing a distinctive sense of flow and atmosphere
to the dancefloor.
With an intuitive feel for rhythm and selection, she effortlessly transforms her deep musical knowledge into
unforgettable moments. Whether at Tresor.West, Druckluft, Junkyard, Goethebunker, or the Kornfeld Festival, she
has a remarkable ability to channel her love for music and movement directly into the crowd.
Her sets are marked by a playful confidence and a finely tuned connection to her audience — creating spaces
where energy circulates naturally and the night unfolds with ease.

As a co-founder of Gitter and Kontaktfeld, Leniart has been part of the underground scene in the Ruhr area since
2018, organizing raves and concerts in Essen and beyond. Behind the decks, his sound is atmospheric, deep, and
driving. Each set is carefully curated for the night and always evolving, with a strong focus on low-end, sub-heavy
sounds. Blending hypnotic, groovy techno with influences of dub and deep house, his sets are sometimes heady
yet irresistibly danceable.
slots.name: Annabelle b2b Leniart

slots.bio:
Dns, member of the Essener collective Gitter and co-founder of the party series abstract_concrete plays with an
energetic fusion of powerful and hypnotic melodies and creates ecstatic sound landscapes throughout his sets.
Driven by the cultural and musical diversity, of his hometown Essen and his playground the Ruhr Area his mixes
display an act of refusing the obvious. He loves to surprise his listeners with groove and funk inspired techno
tunes to loosen the gradually build up tension.

Metrapha, a part of Essenʼs local cultural scene and co-founder of the Gitter collective, guides his listeners
through dark, hypnotic sonic landscapes, where he gradually dares to transition into unknown spheres.
In his DJ sets, he perceives the audience as an emotional resonance body, eliciting visceral reactions through
driving, technoid grooves and melodic, sometimes dub-inspired textures. For him, techno serves as a vehicle to
explore the ineffable and transform the club space into a realm of immediacy.
With both the Gitter Raves and his own event series abstract_concrete, Metrapha regularly brings his vision of
techno to life within the local club scene and at extravagant off-locations. Always in search of the real within track
culture, these carefully curated club nights invite an immersive experience and reveal the profound artistic depth
of techno as an art form.
slots.name: Dns b2b Metrapha

floors.subtitle: Drinks and DJ selections free entry

detail.description:
We’re very excited to be back at Open Ground for our third label night with re:ni, Deetron presents Soulmate and the Zenker Brothers.

Ilian Tape stands for a wide musical spectrum and we’re always open to many directions — but our roots lie in Techno, and this night will clearly celebrate that side of the label.

For us, Techno can be many things: it can be dark or uplifting, straight or broken, but it always needs one thing — groove. We love it funky, soulful and with a personal touch.

re:ni will kick things off smoothly and bring her signature UK touch to the floor. The Zenker Brothers will then pick up the energy and flow with the atmosphere of the night. Closing the night is a true legend: Deetron with his Soulmate project — a highly skilled DJ with decades of experience who will guide you into the morning.

One Love
SPA
returns to Open Ground for a masterclass in forward-thinking club music, blending bass-heavy techno with grime, footwork, and fractured rhythms. The night explores the full spectrum of the underground, shifting from atmospheric depth to raw, unapologetic intensity. It’s an immersive journey through weighted beats and creative mixing, built for those who thrive at the edges of sound.

Admission 20 € / before 23:00 15 €

slots.bio: re:ni is the alias of Lauren Reni Bush, a DJ & producer based in South East London. Born in Birmingham and later raised in Dorset, re:ni's sub-heavy sound marries deep, dank dub sonics with dark & twisted mutations of techno, jungle and dubstep, characteristic of her label, party and radio show "re:lax" which she runs with Hessle Audio affiliate Laksa. Following her steady rise as an internationally recognised DJ, having played institutions like De School, fabric and Panorama Bar multiple times, re:ni released her debut 12" Revenge Body on Ilian Tape in 2022. This year saw the release of her second EP BeautySick which came out via Batu's Timedance label, as well as her first 12" on her own imprint.
slots.name: re:ni

slots.bio:
Rooted in the legacy of Detroit and Techno, House, Dub, Rap Music and Breakbeats, the two brothers managed to define their own trademark sound over the years with their own productions, and their own way of running a label by building a fundament with patience.
The brothers never forget their roots, where they came from and the essential meaning of a well-known Munich proverb: “Live and let live”, so furthermore they transcend the musical legacy of their hometown into the new millennium, shaping and forming it the Zenkerian way towards something very unique and – even more important – connective.
slots.name: Zenker Brothers

slots.bio:
Being involved with making and playing music for almost 30 years, Deetron stands as a pillar ofconsistency, creativity, and technical mastery.Renowned for his mind-boggling three-deck DJ-sets,signature remixes, and a richly diverse discography, he has built a career defined by quality, depth, and authenticity.

Raised in Bern, Switzerland, young Deetron’s passion was rooted in hip-hop and turntablism, driven by alove for vinyl and inspired by local hero DJ Djaimin and an eye opening DJ-set from Jeff Mills in the early‘90s.He absorbed the traditions of DJ-ing; those basic, yet crucially important elements: a broad yet accessible selection, true skills built up from hours and hours of practice and dedication.

Today, Deetron is an icon for a new generation of DJ's and producers.His mixing ability is second tonone with vinyl still an intrinsic part of his creative process, pledging wholehearted allegiance to hisroots.The art of his crate-digging & mixing has been eternalised through multiple official mix CD’s ('InThe Mix', 'Fuse presents Deetron', 'Balance 020', 'Fabric 76', 'DJ-Kicks’).
slots.name: Deetron pres. SOULMATE

slots.bio: DJ Brom aka FRANCE ’98 is a musician, DJ and graphic designer based in Cologne. In 2018 he co-founded the label SPA Recordings alongside longterm friends Philip Jondo and Friday Dunard, accompanied by Sarah San & Manuel Sékou. Their output marks 17 releases in different formats and numerous radio shows for their monthly NTS residency. Besides his work as an artist DJ Brom co-curates events and festivals such as Cologne's renowned annual 'Night of Surprise'.
slots.name: DJ Brom

slots.bio:
With co-signings from some of Europe’s most influential venues, platforms and labels, including Düsseldorf’s Salon des Amateurs and London’s NTS Radio, Cologne-based artist Phillip Jondo has garnered a reputation as a first-class DJ and producer since many years.
His debut EP Little Princess for Dekmantel (2021), featured knockout collaborations with Maxwell Sterling, DJ Plead and Moa Pillar. Jondo’s latest BISQU EP feat. Xzavier Stone and DJ Plead will be released via his own imprint SPA Recordings and treads a similarly weighty path. The label SPA was launched in 2018 by Jondo and his friends DJ Brom and Friday Dunard.
Since 2014 Phillip has been regularly hosting shows on NTS and inviting international guests to deliver forward thinking and creative selections. His sets cover everything from grime, house, footwork, jungle, rap, dancehall, R&B, disco to bass-heavy techno. Jondo’s passion for experimentation made him a unique selector, who has been able to seamlessly connect the dots between various styles through thoughtful layering and creative mixing skills.
With highlight shows including festivals and clubs like Draaimolen, Meakusma, Dekmantel, Dekmantel Selectors, Melt, Robert Johnson and De School, Jondo has presented his distinctive sound to a variety of audiences across Europe.
slots.name: Phillip Jondo

slots.bio:
Zora Jones has always thrived at the edges of sound and vision. Her 2020 debut album, Ten Billion Angels, stretched across 11 tracks of ghostly voices and fractured rhythms, channeling an entire spectrum of emotion into a vivid, otherworldly experience. The record marked a culmination of years spent pushing boundaries, both on her own and in collaboration.

Back in 2014, she co-founded Fractal Fantasy with Sinjin Hawke - a fluid, shape-shifting platform where their interactive experiments and musical projects could come alive. The duo has since toured the world with a relentless AV live show, refining and reimagining it since. Along the way, Zora carved out her own lane with shorter releases like her debut EP 100 Ladies and the collaborative Vicious Circles on Planet Mu, while also linking with artists including Jlin, La Zowi, Scratcha DVA, and Heavee.

Now, 2026 signals a new chapter. After a club-centric EP early in the year, her new album will deliver a raw and unapologetic body of work that oscillates between fragility and ferocity - a testament to survival and defiance in the face of pain. It’s a bold statement of intent: Zora Jones isn’t just passing through - she’s building worlds, and she’s here to stay.
slots.name: Zora Jones

floors.name: LOBBY + ANNEX

slots.bio:
DJ finsterNiz (BitchesxWitches) moves between bass-heavy and atmospheric sound without sticking to one lane. Her approach is stripped back and precise — broken, slightly shifted rhythms, sharp drums and deep, controlled low-end.
The energy doesn’t rely on big drops. It builds steadily, stays present and pulls you in — dark, hypnotic and focused. At the same time, there are moments that open up, creating space to breathe without losing tension.
Minimal, direct and grounded in a deconstructed, mental approach — made for the heads.

With a fascination for all things bass & breaks, matildnz likes to play whatever tickles her brain, touches her soul or gets her body moving — preferably all at once. Aiming to create more spaces for unique electronic sounds, the DJ, designer and digital artist has been involved in the local music scene for quite some time now, organizing events as part of IVORY as well as curating the online radio station beton.fm.

Motivated by her passion for dance and deconstructed club music, @sun_ma____ (BitchesxWitches) based in the Ruhr area, takes you on a sonic journey. A mosaic of leftfield electronic music, carried by hypnotic rhythms, glitchy surfaces, driving drums and pulsating bass lines.
slots.name: finsterNiz b2b Matildnz b2b Sun_ma

floors.subtitle: Drinks and DJ selections free entry

slots.bio:
Zoë Mc Pherson embodies the unexpected. Their vibrant, nuanced music tests sonic extremes and musical pleasure, grapples with politics and raw emotion, shapes fantasy concepts and meditates on reality.

Contrasts are hardwired into their projects, performances and collaborations, bringing bold forms into sharp relief — the constant in their art is evolution.

Mc Pherson has developed an arc of accomplished albums and EPs which strike out into uncharted zones, moving from the acute percussive angles of earlier albums through to more melodious, vocal-charged exploration. The sonic elements shifting within their sound reach from the physicality of soundsystem music to the hyper-kinetic rhythms of singeli, avant-garde synthesis, textural experimentation and the unfiltered emotive impact of club-ready pop.
slots.name: Zoë Mc Pherson

slots.bio:
Rob Smith, aka RSD has been moving minds, hearts, bodies and VU meters for decades. Irrepressible innovator, tastemaker and an incredible influence on all forms of dubrelated music since the eighties. A paragon for generations that have followed. With releases on respected labels including Tectonic, Punch Drunk, Black Box, Moonshine, Foundation Audio etc., RSD’s sound is typified by heavy soundsystem style sub bass lines and junglist dub breaks.

With a staggering discography and a range of projects encompassing Dub, Reggae, Jungle, 2-Step, Dubstep and Trip Hop, Rob returns to Europe after his 2025/26 tour of Japan, Hong Kong and south east Asia and is excited to be embarking on this summer’s shows.
slots.name: Rob Smith

slots.bio: Born and raised in Jordan, DJ and producer Yazan Zyadat, aka Toumba, is now based inLondon, where he fashions lithe club bangers that melt Middle Eastern elements withdubstep basslines and clattering breaks. Last year he experienced a flurry of interest whenBen UFO's Hessle Audio label released his "Petals" EP and Zyadat was able to broadcasthis unique sounds on a larger platform. Tonally ambitious and deviously percussive, hismusic takes the essence of Arabic tarab and shelat forms (often seen as wedding music)and dilutes it in a dance floor-ready roil of booming bass and dissociated synths
slots.name: Toumba

slots.bio:
For more than 30 years, Hans Nieswandt is a well know and highly respected personality in the music scene of Germany and beyond, a legendary character in the world of DJ culture, music production and pop culture writing.

As a DJ, the width of his depth is breathtaking. His club sets are usually build around his deep mix of disco, house and techno, but he also sometimes plays hippie music, hiphop, folk, jazz, soul, reggae, post punk, yacht rock, baroque pop and so on.
slots.name: Hans Nieswandt

slots.bio: Best known for his diverse sets in the clubs of Cologne Uh-Young Kim interweaves funkyriddims with deep grooves and resistant rave signals. Under the moniker Dub Kimski he traces dance music back to its origins in Jamaican studios and embraces its sonic offsprings from Detroit via London to Durban transforming any floor into a happening space.
slots.name: Uh-Young Kim

detail.description:
SWAMP

With the mission to complement and strengthen the Jungle and dark (Halftime-) Drum & Bass scene in North Rhine-Westphalia, SWAMP provides a vibrant grassroots venue where Jungle and Bass-Music enthusiasts come together to build and share experiences of musical journeys filled with emotional depth, rhythmic movement and an intimate vibe.

At our predominantly FLINTA*-fronted nights at AZ Wuppertal, cutting-edge Jungle and D&B meet dusty crate-digging gems and experimental sounds curated by emerging as well as established selectors from North Rhine-Westphalia and beyond.

At 'Open Lobby', we will start with a set by Mar, SWAMP's co-initiator and selector of all tings dub and jungle-related.
Mar will play a warm welcome set ranging from soulful pre- and early reggae vocals to deep, rocking dub basses.

Building on the dubwise, Erdy Bat, who has been involved with SWAMP since the beginning, will take us on a journey through murky halftime drum and bass, tribal tech step and of course, banging jungle tunes. She has been making her mark on the German D&B scene with her crew, Shake Up, since the early 2000s.

Gert, who joined SWAMP in 2025, will take us further into the deep, spiralling realms of halftime drum & bass. We are looking forward to experiencing Gert's distinctive psychedelic selections and getting a sneak preview of his forthcoming ritualistic productions on Onset Audio.

Petty Criminal, a music enthusiast and long-standing supporter of SWAMP, both on and off the decks, will bring the session to a close with a selection of atmospheric jungle and weird, experimental drum and bass. If you're interested, check out Petty Criminal's show on Callshop Radio.

See you on the dancefloor
Come by, say hi
Big Ups!

floors.name: LOBBY + ANNEX
floors.subtitle: Drinks and DJ selections free entry

detail.description:
A meeting point of dance music history, bringing all worlds together on one floor — where foundational grooves meet dub techno and forward-thinking electronics, tracing a line between past, present and future through a shared language of rhythm and sound.
Annex will be shaped byatmospheric and driving techno unfolds, where vinyl-led selections move between Detroit influence, industrial edge and emotive depth, where distorted elements, fragmented sounds and steady percussive force build a tense, hypnotic pull on the dancefloor.
Admission 25 €

slots.bio:
Moritz von Oswald is one of electronic music's most quietly influential figures - a composer, producer, and engineer whose work has shaped the sonic language of the last four decades.

Trained as a classical percussionist, von Oswald came of age in the early 1980s avant-garde before co-founding the landmark Basic Channel/Maurizio and Rhythm and Sound project with Mark Ernestus. Together they wrote the blueprint for minimal techno and dub-inflected electronic music, records that remain touchstones across virtually every corner of contemporary club culture. As founder of Berlin's Dubplates & Mastering, he brought the same precision to sound reproduction, setting a benchmark for mastering quality that defined an era.

The decades since have seen him move fluidly across contexts - from his celebrated Deutsche Grammophon commission with Carl Craig, reinterpreting Ravel and Mussorgsky through an electronic lens, to the Borderland project with Juan Atkins, to The Moritz von Oswald Trio, where jazz improvisation and electronic music are drawn into unpredictable dialogue with collaborators including Vladislav Delay, Laurel Halo, and the late Tony Allen among many other projects.

Technical mastery and honest curiosity in equal measure - von Oswald remains an artist in constant motion.
slots.name: Moritz von Oswald

slots.bio:
Pioneer, Icon, Mogul, and Renaissance man are all words that describe Louis Burns a/k/a Lil Louis. An international Artist, Producer, Songwriter, DJ, Author and Director, Lil Louis is credited as being the Founding Father of House Music.
As the son of the late great Blues artist Bobby Sims, music became essential in Louis’s adolescent life when at age 8 he begin to play the drums and bass. In 1974, while working at a party organized by his mother Mary to unite Chicago gangs, Louis was asked to play after the DJ fell ill. The acclaim from the crowd birthed the 12-year-old’s career as a DJ, and by many accounts, the birth of House music. Shortly after, he began DJing at adult nightclubs. It was during a police raid at the River’s Edge club, that Louis was given his now renowned stage name “Lil Louis” from a riled, witty police officer.
slots.name: Lil' Louis

slots.bio: Agnes‘ vinyl-only sets are atmospheric, with distorted and driving elements and transition into driving Techno. They are characterized by old and new techno tracks, with influences from Detroit and industrial.
slots.name: Agnes Stark

slots.bio: Sonae hat keine Scheu vor komplexen Themen, verhandelt sie in mehrstündigen Live-Sets für den Dancefloor, wo sie zweifellos hingehören. Es ist Musik, die trotz clubtauglicher Strukturen nicht nur funktioniert, sondern etwas will, irritiert, eine eigentümliche Sogwirkung hat. Gebilde aus Knistern, geisterhaften Klangfragmenten, Sirenen und Glocken, denen längst die Stimme versagt hat, zeternde Störgeräusche, klapperndes Kleinzeug, zusammengehalten von einem unmissverständlichem Beat—Stolpertechno.
slots.name: Sonae (live)

slots.bio: Agnes‘ vinyl-only sets are atmospheric, with distorted and driving elements and transition into driving Techno. They are characterized by old and new techno tracks, with influences from Detroit and industrial.
slots.name: Agnes Stark

slots.bio:
Having spent much of her youth deep in Cologne’s techno scene while staying connected to Georgia’s electronic music culture, Mariami brings a blend of both influences to her sets—carefully built, emotive and textured.

Since 2021, she has been part of the Brutalism label, where she also curates events across West Germany.

Her sound is subtle yet forceful, emotional yet controlled. Long transitions and contrast-driven selections define her approach, moving fluidly between atmospheric rhythms and heavier, percussive elements.
slots.name: Mariami

floors.name: LOBBY + ANNEX

slots.bio: Nils Schuckel ist ein leidenschaftlicher Vinyl-DJ aus Hattingen, der sich bewusst nicht auf ein bestimmtes Genre festlegt. Von Minimal über House bis hin zu Techno und Trance findet sich in seiner Plattensammlung eine große musikalische Vielfalt. Für die Open Lobby präsentiert er jedoch seine minimalistische und housige Seite – mit treibenden Grooves, warmen Sounds und viel Emotion.
slots.name: Nils Schuckel

slots.bio: ST.Techno is a Düsseldorf based DJ shaped by the raw energy of the Ruhr area. His sound is dedicated to hypnotic techno, deep, driving and focused on tension, flow and long form progression. His sets unfold through extended blends, subtle shifts and a constant build of pressure, prioritizing atmosphere over speed. The result is an immersive, forward pulling journey for sustained club impact, always with an element of unpredictability and spontaneity. Influenced by the meticulous approach of forward thinking underground club culture and the intensity of long running spaces where music, time and atmosphere merge into one experience, ST.Techno delivers a stripped back, precise and deeply immersive sound built for the dancefloor.
slots.name: Delle b2b ST.Techno

floors.subtitle: Drinks and DJ selections free entry

detail.description:
The night moves through early
Detroit
techno
and
Berlin dub techno
with
Fadi Mohem
and
Marcel Dettmann
, delivering a sound rooted in reduction, repetition and forward momentum. Long blends, rolling grooves and subtle shifts in intensity shape the flow of the night from start to finish.
Barulho World returns to Annex, bringing a curated night to Dortmund that moves between club culture and global sonic landscapes.

As a collective, Barulho World stands for a perspective on
electronic music that centers Afro-diasporic influences
and connects local scenes with international currents.

The musical focus lies on
Afro-electronic sounds
in their full range: from Afrohouse and
Afrotech
to
Gqom
,
Baile Funk
and
Kuduro
, extending into genre-crossing hybrid forms. Rather than fixed categories, the emphasis is on music as a connecting force.

A key part of this approach is the integration of live and hybrid elements. Through hardware, performative setups, or voice, the music remains immediate and closely tied to the moment. The dancefloor becomes not only a space for listening, but for experiencing performance itself.

With Frau Beji, Piccell and D[Nowhere]J, different perspectives come together, each embodying this approach and shaping the space both sonically and emotionally.

Admission 25 €

slots.bio: Influenced by early Detroit techno and Berlin dub techno, drum'n'bass and IDM, the Berghain resident likes to break the frame as a producer & DJ. Coupled with fast and razor-sharp multi-deck mixing, he continues to develop his DJ sets with forward thrust and pursues the goal of a unity-creating experience on the floor. His productions and sets are united by a constant lookout for groove, flow, reduction and repetition and follow the urge to surrender oneself solely to the music.
slots.name: Fadi Mohem

slots.bio:
DJ and producer Marcel Dettmann is recognized as one of the most influential proponents of contemporary techno. Widely associated with iconic places – Berlin, Berghain and Hard Wax – Dettmann stays true to his roots by consistently innovating his interpretation of electronic music, integrating art with the scene.

Active since the mid 90’s, Dettmann quests tirelessly for new ways and inspiration to further develop his own concept of electronic music. His labels MDR (Marcel Dettmann Records) and Bad Manners serve as a platform upon which to shape his musical vision, and through its releases launch new talent onto the techno scene. As a curator and producer, Dettmann fosters the call to create in a way which is equally timeless and innovative. His own releases comprise three albums on Ostgut Ton and, most recently, his first album in ten years, Fear of Programming, via Dekmantel Records.

Outside of the club context, Marcel Dettmann has established himself as a multi-faceted artist. He designed the sound concept for New Works, an exhibition of photographer Frederike von Rauch, contributed to the contemporary dance project Masse – together with Frank Wiedemann and choreographer Nadja Saidakowa in cooperation with Berghain and the Berlin State Ballet. His single “Seduction feat. Emika” provided the soundtrack to director and screenwriter Parker Ellerman’s short film of the same name. He further has contributed to the soundtrack of The Matrix Resurrections by Lana Wachowski in 2021.
slots.name: Marcel Dettmann

slots.bio:
Frau Beji brings a unique blend of North African roots and Afro-electronic music to the stage. Living and working in Dortmund as a DJ, Frau Beji aims to take her audience on a journey, conveying emotions and inspiring healing through her music.Deeply connected to Afro-electronic music, Frau Beji enjoys genres such as Afrohouse, Afrotech, and Melodic -House & Techno. Her sets are not only known for their musical diversity, but also for their spiritual atmosphere. Frau Beji aims to create a sense of connection and community through her music, providing an unforgettable experience.

Her North African heritage plays an important role in her music. By combining her roots with modern sounds, she creates a unique musical vision. Through her music, she aims to build bridges between cultures and bring people together.
slots.name: Frau Beji

slots.bio:
D[Nowhere]J is a unique voice in South Africa’s Gqom scene, channeling the energy of their culture into music that bridges worlds and connects people. Their performances have taken them around the globe, gracing stages from Rome and Istanbul to Berlin, Oslo, Manchester, and Amsterdam, where they leave a lasting impression on audiences and venues alike.

In 2024, D[Nowhere]J debuted with Iyaphila, a track that quickly gained recognition, securing the cover of Spotify’s Gqom Power House playlist. This release encapsulates their style—bold, raw, and emotionally resonant—melding Durban’s gritty Gqom sound with Soweto’s unbreakable spirit.

D[Nowhere]J is a storyteller, using music to explore themes of connection and self-discovery. Each beat invites listeners into a shared celebration of life, dissolving differences and emphasizing our shared humanity on the dance floor.
slots.name: D[Nowhere]J

slots.bio: Piccell is a DJ, producer, and the founder of Barulho, a collective pushing Afro-electronic music and local club culture in Germany. His sound blends AfroTech, Gqom, Kuduro, and Hardgroove, fueled by live elements and his signature MPC. With deep roots in Angola and Germany, Piccell’s sets and productions reflect a unique cultural fusion. Through Barulho, he’s building a label and creating spaces for artists and audiences to connect, while redefining what the local scene can be.
slots.name: Piccell

floors.name: LOBBY + ANNEX

slots.bio: EPHIE began her career as a DJ in the Ruhr Area eleven years ago. In the beginning she organized many club festivals with up to six floors together with her collective. In 2018, she became a resident DJ at her favorite club, Goethebunker in Essen. Since she is one of those artists who discovered her dedication to techno on the dance floor, you will always recognize her very strong connection to the crowd. EPHIE’s sound can be described as powerful and hypnotic, groove-oriented techno mixed with breakbeats. During her career she played at various venues like Tresor.West in Dortmund, Odonien and Artheater in Cologne, Mensch Meier in Berlin, Fuchs2 in Prague and the infamous Institut fuer Zukunft in Leipzig and played at several festivals including Fusion Festival, Feel Festival and Sa Terza Metari Festival in Sardinia. Her passion for vinyl records grew so strong in the recent years that she was invited to play her first vinyl only set at the Kompakt Recordstore in Cologne in 2025. Since then she has been playing more and more all-vinyl sets – recently at Open Ground in Wuppertal in early 2026. EPHIE recently curated an event for young, upcoming DJs, thereby setting an example for promoting new talents within the club scene.
slots.name: EPHIE

slots.bio: randal1na is a DJ from Bochum, Germany, whose dynamic sets transport listeners through hypnotically driven techno and fast grooves. Her sound combines deep, dark, and atmospheric sounds, with unique percussion textures and purposefully psychedelic moods. As a dedicated member of the FLINTA*4Rave collective, randal1na uses her platform to advocate for greater diversity and equality within the music industry in the Ruhr area. In 2024, she became a resident at Goethebunker in Essen, a renowned underground Club for contemporary dance music. She has played at a variety of venues and events, including Goethebunker in Essen, Tresor.West in Dortmund, Rote Flora in Hamburg or Artheater in Cologne.
slots.name: randal1na

slots.bio: Raised in Germany’s Ruhr region and rooted in Turkey, Kaya Schwarz found his way into DJing at an early age. Coming from a background in classical music and drumming, he quickly developed a refined sense for rhythm, dynamics, and sound. Based in Berlin since 2014, he has shaped a hybrid sound between hypnotic, groove-oriented techno and polyrhythmic tension. His residency at Goethebunker, alongside appearances in Berlin clubs such as Tresor and his connection to the infamous Baracke Bochum crew, form key reference points in his artistic development. As a sound designer, Kaya combines studio work, club experience, and ongoing musical exchange into sets with a clear signature: raw, precise, and deeply rooted in rhythm.
slots.name: Kaya Schwarz

floors.subtitle: Drinks and DJ selections free entry

detail.description:
A night shaped by
experimental Detroit techno
, genre-bending selections and a steady awareness of the dancefloor. Moving from hypnotic and stripped-back
techno
into
house
,
jungle
and raw machine-driven rhythms.
For nearly ten years,
Callshop Radio
has been broadcasting live to the world. What began in a backyard in Düsseldorf as part of the interdisciplinary cultural space ROOOOOM has, over the years, evolved into an established community radio, building studios in Leipzig, Paris, and Vienna. The
diversity of genres
reflects the many facets of the scenes that Callshop Radio calls home.

Alongside its ongoing radio program, events have always been a core part of the collective. Collaborations with festivals, clubs, museums, and concert venues create opportunities to bring the station’s hosts onto the stage beyond the studio. The focus remains on connecting artists from different locations and shaping events collaboratively.

On June 13, the radio stays true to this vision: for the Annex Floor at Open Ground, alongside one guest and two residents from the Düsseldorf and Leipzig locations have been invited.

Admission 25 €

slots.bio: The Tottenham London born-and-bred selector grew up on soul and reggae, later becoming a dedicated junglist. First as a resident DJ at the legendary London club Plastic People, she’s built a rep as one of the most effective and interesting DJs around. Playing shape-shifting, genre-bending sets that effortlessly move from classic rare groove and disco records to upfront house and techno, via garage, jungle and whatever else she feels like. With no social media presence, Josey’s reputation is based on selection, passion and authenticity.
slots.name: Josey Rebelle

slots.bio:
Since 1994 Terrence Dixon is widely known for his experimental approach to Detroit Techno. He has been on some of the most prestigious electronic music labels such as Metroplex, Tresor, Rush Hour, Axis, Delsin, 30 drop, minimaldetroitaudio(mda) and Trip just to name a few, He also has rare appearances on Slam radio and nts radio.
His record releases are on another level, the "From The Far Future" series on Tresor, his album "Reporting From Detroit" on Rush Hour...to the four classics he has on Metroplex records in Detroit.
His unique approach to live shows is the same as the music he makes, all original unreleased material expect anything at any time but with a very steady awareness of the dance floor and mind.
slots.name: Terrence Dixon (live)

slots.bio:
Cisco Ferreira, known as The Advent and based in London, can be described in a variety of ways: as a musician, a trailblazer, a sound designer, a consistent presence, a tenacious individual, a rebel, an icon, an outsider, and a remarkable live performer.

However, The Advent is primarily recognised for his unique take on what we refer to as Techno. From the moment the young Portuguese Cisco encountered Acid House in the London clubs he frequented, his mission has been to carve out his niche in the electronic music landscape. As he recently expressed, “I’ve been doing this for quite a few years and I’m not going anywhere,” which encapsulates his determination. Unlike some of his peers, you won’t catch Ferreira engaging in sensationalistic antics or fretting over the integrity of mainstream artists. He embodies everything you appreciate about techno, minus the unnecessary theatrics.
slots.name: The Advent

slots.bio: Grinsta's musical journey started with dubstep and many formative nights at places like Salon des Amateurs, Golzheim and RBC. Contributing to and moving within the multifaceted world of Callshop Radio has further broadened his musical horizons, and throughout it all he has developed a deep appreciation for records that are accompanied by dim lights and a bass heavy system.
slots.name: Grinsta

slots.bio:
House aficionado who's been generating serious buzz. Co-founder of Dubble Records, he has transformed into one of the scene's best-kept secrets, an irresistible force of percussive, rolling dubby goodness that everyone craves.

With a growing army of supporters that includes heavyweights like Enzo Siragusa, Gene on Earth, Laidlaw, Sibil and DJ Sweet6teen,

Brennan is no longer just an emerging talent; he's a namesake in the making. His infectious grooves and expert craftmanship have not only won over fans but have also solidified his reputation as a wizard in the studio.

Brennan is also a seasoned DJ, effortlessly commanding the decks alongside talents such as Garrett David, Taslo, Youandewan, and Liquid Earth. Each set is a testament to his versatility, where he fuses deep basslines with hypnotic rhythms that keep the dance floor alive.

As he continues to carve out his niche, Brennan is poised to become a defining voice in the world of tech house.
slots.name: Brennan

slots.bio:
Originally from East Germany, based in Leipzig, Miss Take began her journey into DJing by making mixtapes for her loved ones.

She brings her signature blend of deep basslines, dubby sounds and broken rhythms. Always guided by cheeky vocals and intuitive energy.

From new age, alternative and wave influences in her radio shows and listening sets to bass-heavy explorations on the dance floor, she stands for vibes over genres. Loving many sounds and often all at once, Miss Take refuses to take only one path. Instead, she blends everything together, creating a unity that feels whole and fluid. Her music connects movement and mood, always led by the bass.
slots.name: Miss Take

floors.name: LOBBY + ANNEX

slots.bio:
Aufgewachsen mit Vocals, Rhythmus und viel Gespür für Groove, steht DJ PLUS PLUS für housige Sets mit Einflüssen aus Chicago House, warmen Basslines und einer starken musikalischen Dynamik.

Geprägt durch Chorgesang, Gesang und autodidaktisches Keyboardspiel entwickelte er früh ein Gefühl für musikalisches Storytelling und Atmosphäre auf dem Dancefloor. Zwischen München und Köln unterwegs, bleibt er dabei eng mit dem blütezeit.kollektiv verbunden.
slots.name: DJ Plus Plus

slots.bio:
Aus dem Kern von Paella Groove.
Wer den Sound kennt, kennt ihn auch.

Zwischen House, Breaks und Electro bewegt sich Dennis Janeczek mit einem Gespür für rohe Grooves, präzise Rhythmen und die Energie des Dancefloors. Keine festen Formeln, kein unnötiges Overthinking — sondern genau das, was im Moment funktioniert.
slots.name: Dennis Janeczek

floors.subtitle: Drinks and DJ selections free entry

detail.description:
Freifeld begins with a
Dub-Set
by Tasha and Stojche, before moving between
deep house
,
techno
and
bass-informed
club music. Sensual vocal-led house, raw vinyl-driven techno rooted in Detroit, and
UK bass
,
breaks
and
jungle
unfold in fluid sets shaped by a music-first attitude and an unpolished underground energy.
This night, Annex will be rooted in
DIY soundsystem culture
and
deep bass
. Moving between dub, steppers, broken UK rhythms, experimental electronics and 4x4 basslines, shaped by a collective approach to selection and a strong focus on low frequencies and community energy.

Admission 20 € / before 23:00 15 €

slots.bio: Tasha’s DJing style weaves tunes together seamlessly from her bass informed home of the UK alongside four four techno forms born in Berlin and Detroit. With an accomplished and atmospheric hold on the dancefloor expect upfront cuts mixed in with some old gems and other styles in between like D&B / Jungle. In an industry where artists are asked to prioritize their art for social media presence, likes and other vacuous pursuits, Tasha is very much in demand for her ‘music first’ attitude, selection and ability.
slots.name: Tasha

slots.bio: Already classic, Galcher Lustwerk is a complete, unique vibe. The New York-based producer, DJ, and vocalist ignited a fervent and instant fanbase in 2013 with his mix of all original material, “100% Galcher”. Its sexy blend of azure deep house productions and analgesic rap murmurs spawned many imitators, but as Pitchfork noted in their “Best Reissue” review, Lustwerk created, “a style that didn’t sound like anything else in dance music – not then, not before, not since.” That’s why he’s been in demand ever since, signing to Ghostly International and touring around the world. Regular stops include the most prestigious clubs and festivals, both underground (Panorama Bar, Sustain Release) and more mainstream (Ministry of Sound, Splash House) – testament to a sound both beloved and accessible. Whether performing a normal DJ set or mixing all originals with live vocals, Galcher presents music as essential as a heartbeat: sensual, timeless, and utterly original.
slots.name: Galcher Lustwerk

slots.bio:
Musical trends may fluctuate over time, but some artists remain pillars unscathed by the change in the tides. One such artist is undoubtedly Stojche Cvetanovski. Native of Skopje, Macedonia, he established himself as notable undeground techno rebel, trapped in the urban chaos of the 21st century. Being exposed early to the expasion of the Motor City sounds in the Macedonian capital, triggered him to explore his own path in this futuristic music phenomenon called Techno.

As an artist that always remained true to his vinyl collection, he played a vital role in the vibrant underground scene across the region. After a decade devoted solely to djing, he shifted to producing, and in 2009 he co-founded “Argumento Music”.
slots.name: Stojche

slots.bio:
Mogol Soundsystem Crew is the connection between DIY soundsystem culture and electronic underground club sound. The project started out with the idea to open up the local bass music scene in Wuppertal by building a precise and sub-oriented system and doing parties with it, connecting the scene. Over time, a solid crew of regular selectors formed around the system, each one with their own distinctive approach to the art of selection – ranging from deep dub and heavyweight steppers to broken UK rhythms, experimental electronics, and driving 4x4 basslines, always rooted in soundsystem culture and a shared love for low frequencies.

Since the construcion of the first speaker in early 2024, the Soundsystem was featured at multiple cultural hotspots of Wuppertal, delivering proper sound to the city, while creating a community for like-minded people. The selectors came together at several occasions to host parties in the city and did events at local spots like bars, the Café23 or the Open Lobby at Open Ground.
slots.name: Mogol Soundsystem Crew

floors.name: LOBBY + ANNEX

slots.bio: Bastian Sevens, his sets are deep, functional, inspired by hypnotic Detroit sounds, heavy kicks, rolling basslines, energetic, and driving. He focuses on groove, space, and transients. Bastian grew up in Wuppertal. He has been living in Dortmund since 2024. He is a Co-founder of Cluster Events and the founder of the vinyl-only label Anothr World. Through his label, he connects the local scene in North Rhine- Westphalia with the international scene and provocative art. Two releases have been published. The next upcoming releases will be out soon.
slots.name: Bastian Sevens

slots.bio: JVX is a Spanish DJ based in Essen. He moves comfortably between genres, exploring the space where di@erent sounds meet. His sets are built around contrast and balance, allowing styles to blend naturally while keeping the dancefloor in motion. Rather than committing to a single genre, he focuses on creating fluid, evolving journeys that respond to the moment and the atmosphere. With an open approach to selection and mixing, he uses musical diversity as a foundation, shaping sessions that feel organic, unforced, and guided by feeling as much as rythm.
slots.name: JVX

slots.bio: Verschwender is known for his uncompromising, raw, and hypnotic techno. Since 2018, he has been a core member of the SEELEN Records label, and as Co-founder of the CLUSTER event series, he demonstrates his instinct for contemporary club culture. His high-energy sets have already taken him to Europe’s most important venues—including the Institut fuer Zukunft (IfZ), about:blank, the Blitz Club, Radion Amsterdam, and Tresor.West. His focus remains sharp: Verschwender is currently working on his next solo EP, which will be released exclusively on vinyl later this year on Anothr World.
slots.name: Verschwender

floors.subtitle: Drinks and DJ selections free entry

detail.description:
Experimental
electronics
,
dub
,
techno
and sound-based performance. Shaped by a focus on sound as material, spatial thinking and deep listening, the night unfolds between club energy and more abstract, research-driven sonic forms.
A night moving between
house
,
techno
,
electro
and
breaks
, connecting scenes from the Ruhr area, Berlin, Cologne and beyond. From driving, groovy techno and acid- and synth-driven sounds to hypnotic, break- and house-influenced sets, the evening unfolds as a continuous flow between club energy, live elements and experimental sound forms.
Admission 20 € / before 23:00 15 €

slots.bio:
Lomi is a musician who explores the intersection of sound and architecture. Since co-founding BRUTALISM in 2015, he uses the label as a cultural research platform that explores sonic forms through materials, textures and structure. His approach combines electronic composition with a data-driven exploration of visual media and spatial aesthetics.

Dornen works with modular synthesizers, field recordings and noise to shape raw, sculptural
sound objects. With an experimental and direct approach, he manipulates analog, pure
frequencies and explores the boundaries of sound as both material and medium.
slots.name: Lomi b2b Dornen (hybrid)

slots.bio:
Operating out of Toronto, Trailcam crafts dense music shaped by fractured percussion and
dub's dislocation. Her approach to sound evokes a world that's constantly shifting with its
clean edges eroded by repetition and drift. Released on Northern Electronics, her debut album
Drumlin Loop serves as a weathered map of these sonic territories.
slots.name: Trailcam

slots.bio:
Cecilia Tosh is a DJ, music producer and curator based in Berlin.
Her sound is defined by a steady groove and an atmospheric, playful depth, guiding listeners through journeys rooted in Detroit, minimal, hypnotic and driving techno. Since 2022, she has been a resident at Tresor Berlin.

Expanding her musical practice, she launched the live project Davids & Tosh in 2024 together with Kat Davids. Since then, she has been exploring more improvisational territories between dub, ambient and electronica.

Beyond performing, she develops interdisciplinary projects, having previously brought to life Kotti Island Disc (a large-scale exhibition in public space accompanied by a concept album released on Tresor Records) and CURA Berlin (a cultural open-air venue), both exploring the relationship between sound, spatial environments and urban dynamics. She is also the producer and co-initiator of Machines – The Music Lab, a music production course focused on hands-on learning, hardware-based approaches and empowering participants through collaborative and exploratory practice.

Currently, she is furthering her research in the master’s program Art in Context at UdK Berlin, with a focus on curation.

Måtyrer is a pioneering artist and co-founder of the Brutalism movement, known for pushing boundaries in electronic music and cultivating immersive experiences. With over a decade of background, Måtyrer has established a dynamic presence as a resident at Cologne’s iconic Gewölbe Club, where he also founded Research, a monthly community-centered Sunday party that has become a staple in the local scene.
slots.name: Cecilia Tosh b2b Måtyrer

slots.bio:
Greta Perola, born and raised in Bochum, is part of a new wave of selectors emerging
from the Ruhr area’s electronic music scene.

Believing that anything can resonate when placed in the right moment, breaking
boundaries and exploring genres are key parts of her musical identity.
Her sound blends old-school influences with contemporary club energy, moving through
all kinds of house into electro and breaks, driven by a passion for acid and synthesizers.

Coming straight from the heart, made for the floor!

Kinan Halabi is a Germany based DJ, curator, and event organizer whose sound moves freely between techno, house, electro, and break-driven rhythms. His sets are defined by groove, tension, and narrative flow, blending raw club energy with subtle, detail-oriented selections that adapt to both peak-time dancefloors and deeper, late-night moments.

His journey into electronic music began in 2007 in Aleppo, Syria, where he first connected with DJ culture and underground club sounds. After relocating to Germany, he played his first gigs in 2015, gradually establishing himself within the local scene through a versatile and open-minded approach to music, shaped by both his roots and his evolving club experience.

Beyond the DJ booth, Kinan became increasingly active as a booker and event organizer, focusing on carefully curated line-ups and cohesive night concepts rather than genre boundaries. As a co-founder and resident of Aquatica Collective, he has played a role in developing events that prioritize quality, inclusivity, and a strong sense of atmosphere, bridging house, techno, electro, and broken rhythms into unified dancefloor experiences.

With a background in design and spatial thinking, Kinan approaches DJing as more than track selection, treating each set as a dialogue between sound, space, and crowd. Whether performing or curating, his work is driven by a clear intention: to create immersive nights that feel both physical and memorable.
slots.name: Greta Perola b2b Kinan Halabi

slots.bio:
Lera is a DJ currently based in Dortmund, Germany. She began her journey in 2020 within the Kharkiv project Kultura Zvuka and later became active in Kyiv’s electronic music scene. After relocating across Europe, she continued performing and developing her sound on local scenes.

Her sets blend dense house grooves with a strong sense of space, dynamics, and dancefloor awareness. Built as a continuous narrative, they move from deep, hypnotic moods toward more energetic forms, focusing on rhythm, texture, and long-form flow.
slots.name: Lera Zagrevskaya

slots.bio:
Wasted Lipstick is DJ and event organizer from Essen in the heart of the Ruhr Area. She discovered her passion for electronic music early in her youth and has been part of the techno community ever since.

As the Co-Founder of the Aquatica collective, she advocates for increased visibility of FLINTA* artists and subcultural spaces. With a residency at Essen’s Club Hotel Shanghai and the queer party series Schwesta Party, she has established herself as an emerging DJ in the Ruhr area. Wasted Lipstick represents mainly driving, groovy techno with a big passion for tribal elements. She skillfully blends rhythmic beats with uplifting, playful and melodic elements, ensuring her sets resonate deeply with the crowd. Her music is always attuned to the energy of the dancefloor, creating an engaging atmosphere that invites everyone to lose themselves in the rhythm.

Her sound is versatile, transcending genres while always staying true to the essence of electronic music. Each performance is a journey - balancing intensity and euphoria - making every Set an unique experience for the dance floor.

Nico Zobel is a DJ and producer based in Essen, active in electronic music for several years. As co-founder of the event collective Aquatica, he is part of the local club scene and has released music on labels such as Groove Estate and Abstract Motion. His sound spans groovy techno, house, breaks, and trance-leaning elements, always shaped by the party’s atmosphere and the dancefloor.
slots.name: Wasted Lipstick b2b Nico Zobel

slots.bio:
Artist Proletarian is an Essen based live act focused on techno and genre-fluid electronic music, incorporating influences from synthwave to more experimental sounds. Performing exclusively live, he shapes his sound through hardware such as synthesizers, drum machines, and modular systems. Proletarian’s sets are centered on low-end heavy, percussive, and textural rhythms, layered with all kinds of strange noises and tonal elements. As part of the Delirium collective, he contributes to a DIY-driven scene rooted in community, art, and cultural exchange. Alongside his solo work, he is involved in a workshop-based music initiative with young people from youth care, fostering creativity and self-expression through sound. Through a synthpunk duo project, he merges his roots in punk with electronic music.

HALBTØNE is a live electronic music project specializing in hypnotic, rhythm-driven soundscapes built through gradual progression and controlled dynamics. The project prioritizes precision, continuity, and spatial depth, delivering immersive performances designed for focused listening environments and club settings alike.

Originating from Bulgaria, HALBTØNE developed his practice outside conventional production and performance infrastructures. This independent approach has shaped a disciplined, self-directed methodology where limitation, repetition, and long-term development serve as compositional tools rather than stylistic flourishes.
The project is hardware-only, using a semi-modular setup combinated with Drum machines, allowing for hands-on control, real-time improvisation, and organic evolution of each performance. The focus lies on texture, rhythmic tension, and subtle modulation, ensuring each live set is unique, physically engaging, and meticulously structured.

The project’s work emphasizes the creation of immersive sonic environments, blending physical presence with conceptual depth, offering audiences a sustained and evolving experience rather than momentary impact.
slots.name: Proletarian b2b Halbtøne (live)

floors.name: LOBBY + ANNEX
floors.subtitle: Drinks and DJ selections free entry

detail.description:
Mzansi Bass at Open Ground
celebrates the launch of the forthcoming compilation of the same name, curated by Shannen SP, to be released with Colombian label Tratratrax on the 12th of June.

Built with
100% new material
, Mzansi Bass centers artists pushing the boundaries of
bass music in South Africa
, spotlighting the continuum of
radical invention
coming out of the region’s electronic sphere. Exploring the
hypnotic, darker, bassier sounds
in between
3-step, Gqom and experimental Amapiano
to form a succinct snapshot of the country’s unique
soundsystem culture
. Deeply rooted in
Black African rave music
from the local scenes of Durban, Johannesburg, Cape Town, and Pretoria, Shannen describes it as
“electronic music that is embodied, trance inducing and deeply physical.”

With a powerful line up featuring artists on the compilation, this party presents a unique offering of
bass music
. Durban’s gqom icon DJ Lag, who has collaborated with artists ranging from Moses Boyd to Novelist to Ape Drums and has taken his intoxicating brand of
Gqom
to clubs all over the world, from Seoul, to Colombia to New York. Shannen SP, whose sets platform the
vanguard of the global club underground
with recent tours in India and East Asia, and support slots for Arca, Batu and Jamie XX. State OFFF, the Zimbabwe-born and Amsterdam-based artist who has been igniting dancefloors worldwide with his bold productions and high-energy sets, blending
Gqom, Baile Funk, Dubstep, and other global sounds
, earning him a spot on Mixmag’s „Top 25 Artists to Watch in 2025.“

Expect to hear
boundary pushing club music
,
hybrid genres
and
lots of unreleased material
.

Echidna
strives to carve out spaces for musical expressions which challenge familiar forms,
motivated by an unwavering desire to bring attention to the unnoticed
- through deep bass, sharp rhythms, and music that refuses to quiet down. Echidna is not designed to comfort: we provoke collision to compose an ode to the unknown. Returning to Annex the third time, Echidna teamed up with Andras_2020’s event series Subtle Wreck.

Subtle Wreck grows from a desire
to deepen the presence of diasporic electronic music
in European contexts, moving beyond the obvious and making space for more layered, experimental, and unsettled approaches to sound.

Together,
Echidna x Subtle Wreck
channel their shared ambitions to curate a night that invites you to indulge in
lurching amplitudes
and
unexpected danceability
. Through live performances and DJ sets, the invited artists twist the frameworks of
post-club
and
leftfield bass
into a
kaleidoscope of abrasive sound
that refuses to quiet down.

Admission 20 € / before 23:00 15 €

slots.bio: DJ Lag’s superb production skills have played a big part in transforming a sub-genre of house – one that began by soundtracking taxi trips around Durban – to an enviably innovative participant in the global scene. It's a stunning rise and DJ Lag is ready to put in the work required to make sure Gqom is remembered forever.
slots.name: DJ Lag

slots.bio: Shannen SP is a London based creative hybrid. Her high energy DJ sets explore the vanguard of the global club underground, while her style delves into the darker, edgier side of non Western electronic music. As a DJ, she has supported Arca, Batu, and Jamie XX, with recent tours in East Asia and India. Behind the scenes her A&R work spans Hyperdub, NTS, and Spitfire Audio. Described as “quietly prolific” by Crack Magazine, she has held radio residencies with NTS and Rinse FM, with mixes for Dekmantel, DJ Mag, and Fact. She has performed across international clubs and festivals including Berghain, Oil Shenzhen, Fabric, Nyege Nyege, Glastonbury, and Dekmantel Selectors.
slots.name: Shannen SP

slots.bio:
State OFFF, Zimbabwe-born and Amsterdam-based, has been igniting dancefloors worldwide with his bold productions and high-energy sets, earning a spot on Mixmag’s "Top 25 Artists to Watch in 2025."

His journey began with GQOM TODAY (2022), a debut EP that showcased his forward- thinking approach to Gqom. In 2024, State OFFF cemented his reputation with Simulacra and The Offering, two standout releases blending Gqom, Baile Funk, and other global sounds, alongside EDITSSS, his viral remix series that seamlessly reworks pop, R&B, and hip hop for the club. These projects have racked up millions of views and critical acclaim, positioning him as one of the most innovative producers of the moment.

As a DJ, State OFFF’s command of the dancefloor is unrivaled.
slots.name: State OFFF

floors.name: ANNEX

slots.bio:
Andras_2020 is a rising figure in Europe’s burgeoning electronic music scene. Their sound combines the sonorous ripples of their Latin America with experimental pop, deconstructed club music and avant-garde. With influences that range from Brazilian funk to hyperpop, Andras’ music features lyrics that encompass explicitness, clashing with hard hitting drums and their soft falsetto.

Originally from Brazil, the artist garnered a dedicated following after releasing their intricate and textured debut EP, “Cuerpo Temperamental (acting in concert),” in 2021 and their multiple features on the Mutants Mixtape Compilation, initiated by Venezuelan pioneer Arca. This success was followed by the Cuerpo Tour, which saw Andras enthralling audiences across Europe and the UK for nearly two years. As a live performer, Andras’ work amalgamates contemporary dance and club culture. Their performances fuse the visceral materiality of the body, violent screams, and poetry, exploring themes of survival and physical transformation, contrasted with the gentleness of soft pop live aesthetics.

Motivated by a desire and natural ability to fuse personal experiences with creative expression, Andras released “Blowhole” for Rest Now! (Berlin) in October, 2024. The title candidly contrasts the concept of inhaling and exhaling through a hole, like cetaceans, with anal pleasure and its associations with queerness and discomfort.
slots.name: Andras_2020 (live)

slots.bio: Miserere Mei originated as a side project of Wuppertal raised and Vienna based artist Ungemach @ungemach000 to condense his passion for the remote sides of electronic music into an appropriate shape. With crooked soundscapes and merciless cascades, Miserere Mei traverses borrowings from industrial, noise, UK bass and deconstructed club, without ever being firmly placed in one of these genres. Despite all the brute force, the idea that gave birth to this project is never lost sight of: Joy. As vicious as its expression may be.
slots.name: Miserere Mei (live)

slots.bio: STI ZOI is driven by a fascination with the ever-evolving Zeitgeist and shaped by a rich multicultural perspective. She seeks to create a unique crossroads where music, culture, and identity converge— where genres shift and blend, and each mix becomes an immersive, emotionally textured experience that lives in the in-between spaces.
slots.name: STI ZOI

slots.bio: MYEN can be broken down as a project of audio hyperstition, sonic tulpamancy and self described funeral music. His music is often driven by immersive and cinematic sound design, heavy distortion and an overall feeling of suspense. He is currently based in Leipzig, Germany, has worked on collaborative projects with Raiika, Sissy Misfit and KAVARI and recently self-released his EP "MARTYRDOM".
slots.name: MYEN

slots.bio: B3CKI’s sets are driven by heavy bass, breaks, and bouncy kicks. Always playful, melodic, and rooted in her Indonesian background, with influences from pop, hip-hop, and global club sounds
slots.name: B3CKI

floors.subtitle: Echidna x Subtle Wreck at Open Ground
